CommonLII: Supreme Court of Singapore - High Court

Public Prosecutor v S Iswaran [2024] SGHC 251

IN THE GENERAL DIVISION OF THE HIGH COURT OF THE REPUBLIC OF SINGAPORE

General Division of the High Court - Criminal Case No 50 of 2024

Judgment reserved.

Version No 1: 03 Oct 2024 (11:51 hrs)

The court addressed sentencing for a public servant who obtained valuable things from persons connected with official functions.
